title: Always Watching: A Marble Hornets Story
original_title: Always Watching: A Marble Hornets Story
overview: A small town news team discovers a box of videotapes wherein a faceless figure, dressed in a dark suit, haunts and torments a family...slowly driving them insane. Soon after, they realize that the 'Operator' has begun to stalk them as well.
